title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Snapdeal Logistics

jsonLd.title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Snapdeal Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Snapdeal Logistics! We are hiring a Logistics Manager for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Snapdeal Logistics:
Snapdeal Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
